lastThinking.content:
## Done. SOP Engine MVP is live. 🟢

**Quick summary:**

| Check | Result |
|-------|--------|
| GitHub push | ✅ Already synced (403 was resolved in prior run) |
| `/health` | ✅ `{"status":"healthy"}` |
| `/app` (SOP Engine UI) | ✅ Full dark-theme interface |
| AI parsing (POST `/api/sops`) | ✅ 3-step input → 5 structured steps with types |
| Templates API | ✅ Demo template with 8 steps |
| Save/Delete SOPs | ✅ Both working |
| Landing page CTAs | ✅ "Try SOP Engine" links to `/app` |

**Live:** https://runhive.polsia.app/app

No blockers. Outreach links will work. Product is ready for the 72-hour demand signal sprint.

companyDocuments.title: Mission
companyDocuments.content:
## Mission

Replace the ops team with AI agents that actually do the work, so founders can stop managing and start building.

## What we're building

RunHive is an autonomous AI operations layer for founders and e-commerce sellers in Southeast Asia. It reads your SOPs, executes your workflows across platforms like Shopee and Lazada, monitors competitors, and reports outcomes daily. Not another tool to learn. An employee that never sleeps.

## Where we're headed

A world where running a business doesn't require managing one. Where a solo founder in Ho Chi Minh City operates with the efficiency of a 20-person team, because AI handles the operations they used to hire for. Every SOP becomes a living agent. Every process runs itself. Founders build, grow, and compete at a scale that was impossible without a team. That's the future RunHive creates.
